notes: Editable search/scoring profile used by sam_morning_opportunity_brief.py and sync_sam_opportunity_tracker.py. Edit this file instead of the scripts. The wfg-sam-api-watcher skill also references this profile.

api.rate_limit_note: Non-federal personal SAM.gov API keys are rate-limited to roughly 10 requests/day. Searches use 2-4 requests, description fetches use up to fetch_descriptions_for_top more. Keep the total under 10. Verify your account's actual limit at https://open.gsa.gov/api/get-opportunities-public-api/

value_band.note: standard_legal_sat 350000 is the current legal Simplified Acquisition Threshold; WFG preferred beginner range remains 10000-250000 and internal hard cap remains 500000. Construction at/above 150000 triggers Miller Act performance/payment bonds.

deadlines.note: Small RFQs often post with 7-14 day windows. With a pre-built sub bench WFG can quote in 5-7 days, so do not throw these away; mark them URGENT instead.

naics_core.561790: Other building services (pressure washing, chimney, gutter)
naics_core.238990: All other specialty trades (fencing, paving maintenance, etc.)
naics_core.484210: Used household and office goods moving

naics_watch.236220: Commercial building construction (often above starter size; watch for small repair jobs)
naics_watch.237310: Highway/street construction (watch for small striping/repair scopes)
naics_watch.561612: Security guard services (state licensing required; verify before pursuing)
naics_watch.488490: Other support activities for road transportation

psc_note: S2xx = housekeeping (custodial, guard, landscaping, trash). Z1xx/Z2xx = maintenance/repair/alteration of real property. J0xx = maintenance/repair of equipment. Z3xx = restoration.

set_asides.note: WFG cannot bid certification-gated set-asides (WOSB/SDVOSB/8a/HUBZone) until certifications are verified and approved. They are tracked in the WATCH bucket as future pipeline once WOSB/VOSB paths are confirmed.
